PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('file')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
        PsiPuppetDefaultWrapperImpl(DEFAULT_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(DEFAULT)('default')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
        PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('ensure')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('file')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('owner')
            PsiWhiteSpace('  ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING)('"root"')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('group')
            PsiWhiteSpace('  ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING)('"wheel"')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('mode')
            PsiWhiteSpace('   ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING)('"0600"')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(;)(';')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
        PsiPuppetArrayImpl(ARRAY)
          PsiElement(LIST_START[)('[')
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''ssh_host_dsa_key'')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''ssh_host_key'')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''ssh_host_rsa_key'')
          PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiComment(COMMENT)('# use all defaults')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(;)(';')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
        PsiPuppetArrayImpl(ARRAY)
          PsiElement(LIST_START[)('[')
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''ssh_config'')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''ssh_host_dsa_key.pub'')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''ssh_host_key.pub'')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''ssh_host_rsa_key.pub'')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''sshd_config'')
          PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
        PsiComment(COMMENT)('# override mode')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
        PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('mode')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING)('"0644"')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(;)(';')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
